HESP613 Autism Spectrum Disorders (2 Credits)

Etiology, diagnosis and management of autism spectrum disorders. Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master's) program; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. HESP639A or HESP613.

Formerly: HESP639A.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
